title: Say Her Name: The Life and Death of Sandra Bland
original_title: Say Her Name: The Life and Death of Sandra Bland
overview: Sandra Bland was a bright, energetic activist whose life was cut short when a traffic stop resulted in a mysterious jail cell death just three days later.
